Registry / Terms / carrier gas

carrier gas

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01045 · 4 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102006OIML R 82:2006
#01045
3.1
gas introduced in order to transport a sample for analytical purposes. In gas chromatography it is the gas which is passed continuously through the column and whose passage promotes the elution of the components of the sample. The carrier gas, together with the portions of the sample present in this phase, constitute the mobile phase
pending
20102006OIML R 83:2006
#01061
3.1
gas introduced in order to transport a sample for analytical purposes. In gas chromatography it is the gas which is passed continuously through the column and whose passage promotes the elution of the components of the sample. The carrier gas, together with the portions of the sample present in this phase, constitute the mobile phase
pending

#01045
3.1
gas introduced in order to transport a sample for analytical purposes. In gas chromatography it is the gas which is passed continuously through the column and whose passage promotes the elution of the components of the sample. The carrier gas, together with the portions of the sample present in this phase, constitute the mobile phase
pending

#01061
3.1
gas introduced in order to transport a sample for analytical purposes. In gas chromatography it is the gas which is passed continuously through the column and whose passage promotes the elution of the components of the sample. The carrier gas, together with the portions of the sample present in this phase, constitute the mobile phase
